title: Prevent compact overview zone box overlap
description: Overview zone overlay boxes no longer overlap after the compact lane-spacing change. The overview lane gap now respects zone header/padding needs while remaining smaller than the original wide swimlane spacing.
decision_notes: TASK-039 reduced overview lane gap too far: node lanes were compact, but additive zone boxes still extend upward for labels and downward for padding.
Raised the overview-only lane gap from 48px to 96px instead of restoring the old global lane gap, preserving a more compact overview while preventing same-depth zone boxes from overlapping.
Added a regression that renders overview with the zone overlay and asserts every zone box pair is disjoint.
verification: Browser verification on http://127.0.0.1:4174/examples/demo.html with zone overlay on: zoneBoxCount=3, overlaps=[]
